artifacts.summary: Deep comparison of aerc (v0.21.0) vs notmuch (v0.40) covering development activity, workflow differences, features, and NixOS/Home Manager setup

next_steps: Run /plan 45 to create implementation plan for aerc+notmuch hybrid setup

key_findings: aerc v0.21.0 (March 2026) - 2,921 commits, active development by Robin Jarry at Red Hat
notmuch v0.40 (Jan 2026) - 7,680 commits, mature Xapian-based search library
aerc is complete MUA; notmuch is search backend requiring frontend
Hybrid aerc+notmuch recommended for user's existing mbsync setup
Both have comprehensive Home Manager module support
